ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "subject_no" TEXT /* Subject number of the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "ltp" TEXT /* Lecture-Tutorial-Practical hours for the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "subject_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., CORE, ELECTIVE) */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* JSON array of prerequisite course IDs */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., 100, 200, 300, 400) */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., lecture, lab, seminar) */,
  "grading_scale" TEXT /* Grading scale used for the course (e.g., A-F, Pass/Fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_subject_no FOREIGN KEY ("subject_no") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department that offers the subject */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subject was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subject was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Office location of the faculty member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the faculty member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the faculty member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the faculty member's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is being offered (e.g., Spring, Fall) */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year in which the course is being offered */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member teaching the course */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section number of the course offering */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course is offered (e.g., room number) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of students for the course offering */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Current number of students enrolled in the course offering */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course offering was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course offering was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is enrolled in (e.g., B.Tech, M.Tech) */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree the student is pursuing (e.g., B.Tech, M.Tech) */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year the student was admitted to the university */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected year of graduation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course offering */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., enrolled, dropped, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "max_marks" INTEGER /* Maximum marks for the assignment */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the assignment */,
  "submission_link" TEXT /* Link to submit the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the submission belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who made the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained by the student for the submission */,
  "submission_link" TEXT /* Link to the submitted assignment */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the faculty member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the submission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quizzes" (
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quiz */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the quiz belongs to */,
  "quiz_name" TEXT /* Name of the quiz */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the quiz */,
  "max_marks" INTEGER /* Maximum marks for the quiz */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the quiz */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the quiz in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quiz was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the quiz was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quizzes_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quiz_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "quiz_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quiz the response belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who made the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of response */,
  "marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained by the student for the response */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing details of the responses */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the faculty member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_responses_quiz_id FOREIGN KEY ("quiz_id") REFERENCES quizzes ("quiz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quiz_responses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exams" (
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exam */,
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course offering the exam belongs to */,
  "exam_name" TEXT /* Name of the exam */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exam */,
  "max_marks" INTEGER /* Maximum marks for the exam */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the exam */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exam in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exam was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exam was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exams_offering_id FOREIGN KEY ("offering_id") REFERENCES course_offerings ("offering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exam_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "exam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exam the result belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who took the exam */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date of result declaration */,
  "marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained by the student in the exam */,
  "result_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing details of the exam results */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the faculty member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was declared */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_exam_id FOREIGN KEY ("exam_id") REFERENCES exams ("exam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exam_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the grade belongs to */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade obtained by the student in the course */,
  "grade_points" REAL /* Grade points corresponding to the grade (e.g., A = 4.0, B = 3.0) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the grade was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)
